meaning: n.违反,违背,妨碍,侵害,[体]违例,强奸
examples: To deprive the boy of his education is a violation of state law.
The judge called the decision "a flagrant violation of international law."
His possession of classified documents in his home was, at the very least, a violation of navy security regulations.
Any violation of this agreement may trigger the repayment of 50% of the bonuses previously paid.
Considering politics in the hiring process is a violation of department policy and federal law.
